description: tndm coordination hooks: inject advisory at session start, remind to update tickets when finishing work.

hooks.prompt: This project uses tndm for ticket coordination (git-aware ticket system for AI agents in a monorepo). Review what was accomplished in this session. If work was started, progressed, or completed that corresponds to a tndm ticket, and the ticket status has not been updated to reflect this, suggest the appropriate update command: `tndm ticket update <ID> --status <new_status>`. Only suggest this if it is clearly relevant to the work done. Do not suggest ticket updates for conversational or exploratory sessions. If no ticket update is needed, approve stopping without comment.
